central_claim: Survivable lineage remains the strongest surviving implementation-neutral operational requirement in the current proof corpus.
stop_reason: Required seven bounded passes completed; optional recursion stopped because final claim levels did not change and the placeholder MCP adapter could not add public evidence.
strongest_safe_public_claim: The current proof corpus repeatedly converges on survivable lineage as the strongest implementation-neutral requirement for audit-grade long-horizon operational cognition, but this remains an inferred corpus-level claim requiring redacted-real or public-trace validation.
next_required_validation: Select an eligible public or redacted-real trace under Proof 011, convert it into the fixture format, and run visible-only versus full-lineage replay scoring.
